ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "client" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization for which the project is being developed */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "lead_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the module */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., in development, completed) */,
  "lead_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the module */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of module IDs that this module depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_lead_developer FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the function belongs to */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity score of the function */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Code coverage percentage of the function */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the function */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the function (e.g., in development, completed) */,
  "lead_developer" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the function */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of function IDs that this function depends on */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the function was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_lead_developer FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the statement belongs to */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number of the statement in the code */,
  "total_statements" INTEGER /* Total number of statements in the function */,
  "filtered_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of statements filtered out */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Complexity score of the statement */,
  "uncovered_elements" INTEGER /* Number of uncovered elements in the statement */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the statement */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the statement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the task belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was assigned */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue belongs to */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module the issue belongs to */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the issue belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was assigned */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "assignee" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assignee FOREIGN KEY ("assignee") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)
